title: dryopteris transversaria
intro: Dryopteris transversaria, also known as wood fern or buckler fern, is a species of fern native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris transversaria include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies for skin and digestive issues.
